title: Crispy Vegetable Noodle Stir Fry
description: A quick, flavorful stir-fry dish made with a variety of colorful vegetables and crispy noodles. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced carrots and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until they start to soften.
Add the broccoli and mushrooms and cook for another 3-4 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
Add the vegetable noodles, chili paste, soy sauce, and hoisin sauce to the skillet. Stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, or until the noodles are well coated.
Stir in the crispy fried shallots and sesame seeds.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, or until the noodles are heated through.
Serve hot and garnish with additional crispy fried shallots if desired.
Note: You can also add protein such as chicken or tofu to this dish if you prefer.
Adjust the amount of chili paste to your desired level of spiciness.
Serve with your favorite sides, such as steamed dumplings or a simple green salad.
